content:
Living Forever In a Sterile Env As experience of reality becomes more and more digitalized, one can feel a greater and greater amount of the spectrum of human emotion removed from the ailments and dangers of the “real” world.
Orpheus in The Machine The concept of skin in the game and why we like watching sports.
The heros of our past had to face perils in the “real world” where injury and death are inflicted upon the protagonist in their intense totality.
Wearing armor, having a better metal to craft your weapons out of, tactics of weakening the enemy with cannon fodder so that the real warriors can come in and finish the job, all these facilitate heroic acts that supposedly we all aspire to.
I would argue that these faclitating implements are now pointed inwards, in that our heros no longer take into battle with skin in the game as such, but rather a full life is now more and more possible within virtual worlds.
The capacity for abstraction has us feeling fulfilled by experiences which objectively are just staring a screen.
The transformatin of what and/or who we strive to be has changed.
Equilibrium with ecology & Progress The convergence of The Limits to Growth and l/acc, r/acc as well as Sillicon Valley Techno Optimism is in the fact that they all point their horizons beyond current capitalism status quo.
Perhaps it is through this enchantment of the hero’s journey in the virtual that will allow us to decouple human welfare from material growth.
An adequate, but not excessive standard of living becomes feasibly apealing when fulfillment can be found in the virtual.
The Bait and Switch At the same time, these masses of people now securely trapped with their simple needs and wants easily met in the phisical, while their complex needs and wants *-ADD MORE. COMPLEX YAYA-*are safely isolated to the virtual, incapable of apply any kind of effect on the phisical kindom of our techno-lords.
Perhaps a position inherit to human experience “Our maximum reach outwards…. Praise be to God!” The reassurance of purpose given by the belief in a higher power, purpose.
2001: A Space Oddisey “All watched over by machines of loving grace.”
The ultimate purpose of the human as the maintainer of technology and it is that technology which can and will truly have the experience.
The slave-maintainers, our prayers in the form of 24 hour shifts in the data center, our sacrifices in the form of power re-routing and water supply frugalism.
summary:
Living Forever In a Sterile Env

As experience of reality becomes more and more digitalized, one can feel a greater and greater amount of the spectrum of human emotion removed from the ailments and dangers of the “real” world.

Orpheus in The Machine

The concept of skin in the game and why we like watching sports.

The heros of our past had to face perils in the “real world” where injury and death are inflicted upon the protagonist in their intense totality.
title: Dont Die

content:
The Limits to Growth: A Systems View of Civilization In 1972, at the commissioning of The Club of Rome -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHO THEY ARE-, MIT’s Systems Dynamics Group plotted out a report, which came to be known as ‘The Limits to Growth’. This report is a model of the long-term interactions between the following factors:
Global Population; Industrial Output; Food Production; Nonrenewable Resources; Pollution; All of these factors were then plugged into the ‘World3’ computer model -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHAT IT IS-, which simulated dozens of scenarios.
Business as Usual
summary:
The Limits to Growth: A Systems View of Civilization

In 1972, at the commissioning of The Club of Rome -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHO THEY ARE-, MIT’s Systems Dynamics Group plotted out a report, which came to be known as ‘The Limits to Growth’. This report is a model of the long-term interactions between the following factors:

  1. Global Population;
  2. Industrial Output;
  3. Food Production;
  4. Nonrenewable Resources;
  5. Pollution;

All of these factors were then plugged into the ‘World3’ computer model -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHAT IT IS-, which simulated dozens of scenarios.
title: Limits and Acc
